The company, known as Shuttle Pharma, is a specialty pharmaceutical firm in the discovery and development stage. They concentrate on enhancing outcomes for cancer patients undergoing radiation therapy (RT).
news.headline: Shuttle Pharma announces corporate update, focusing on improving outcomes for cancer patients with radiation therapy.

news.summary: CAVA Group Inc (NYSE: CAVA) released their Q1 financial results, revealing a 28.2% increase in revenue to $331.83 million, surpassing the expected $326.88 million. The Mediterranean fast-casual restaurant chain reported adjusted earnings of 22 cents per share in the first quarter, exceeding forecasts of 14 cents per share. The net income included a $10.7 million income tax benefit associated with equity-based compensation. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: CAVA Group's Q1 revenue rose 28% to $331.83M, beating estimates. Earnings at 22 cents per share exceeded predictions.

news.summary: Orlando-based Falcon’s Beyond Global, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBYD) revealed that they have recently obtained Oceaneering Entertainment Systems (OES) from Oceaneering International Inc. (NYSE: OII). The acquisition includes OES’s worldwide collection of patented technologies, as well as unique engineering and manufacturing methods. As part of the deal, Falcon’s has taken over.
news.headline: Falcon’s Beyond buys Oceaneering Entertainment Systems, expanding global presence in ride systems.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, SunsolveMD revealed Elsa Hosk as the inaugural Global Brand Ambassador for its SunsolveMD range, offering potent SPF solutions. Elsa, a renowned entrepreneur and influential figure, will represent the brand in its launch.
news.headline: Elsa Hosk appointed Global Brand Ambassador for SunsolveMD by TheSolveMD, launching new SPF range.

news.summary: Bitdeer Technologies Group reported a significant decline in revenue, down 41% year-over-year to $70.1 million for the first quarter of 2025, with an operating loss of $3.2 million, compared to a $34.1 million profit from the same period in the prior year. However, they reported a Q1 net income exceeding $400 million, driven by gains on convertible notes and warrants issued to Tether in 2024. Bitdeer's revenue drop is a result of miners moving away from Bitcoin mining towards supplying high-performance computing for artificial intelligence applications. They are also scaling self-mining activities and aim to reach a 40 exahashes per second self-mining hashrate by the end of 2025. The company has been investing in U.S.-based HPC and AI infrastructure to offset losses from waning mining revenue, post the Bitcoin network's halving event in April 2024. Tether owns a 21% stake in Bitdeer, and the company is focusing on US expansion amid concerns of escalating trade wars.
news.headline: Bitdeer's Q1 revenue drops over 40% to $70.1 million, reports $3.2 million operating loss. Net income exceeds $400 million. Mining shifts to AI.

news.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is holding an investor day on May 19th, a crucial moment for the largest bank in the world. The event is highly anticipated by Wall Street for insights on management succession and capital strategy amidst economic uncertainty. JPMorgan's shares have risen 33% since April and are near their all-time high, up 12% YTD, outperforming the Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund which gained 5.4% in the same period. Analysts expect JPMorgan to manage macro uncertainty and explore opportunities in AI, digital assets, and private credit. Analyst Ebrahim Poonawala believes JPMorgan's premium stock valuation is justified, but pressures the bank to perform in the near term. Key themes to watch are CEO succession, with speculation about Jamie Dimon's timeline, and Marianne Lake is considered a potential successor. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: JPMorgan's investor day to address succession and capital strategy, shares rebounded 33% from lows, up 12% year-to-date.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Madison, New Jersey, Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS), a prominent player in residential real estate services, revealed that Ryan Schneider, the Chief Executive Officer and President, will take part in the KBW Virtual Real Estate Finance & Technology event.
news.headline: Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS) CEO to take part in KBW Virtual Real Estate Finance & Technology Conference.

news.summary: The biggest travel agency network in North America is assisting small agencies in flourishing in their business ventures. In celebration of Small Business Month, Travel Leaders Network is strengthening its dedication to equipping small travel agencies with the necessary resources, assistance, and exposure. This initiative aims to support small agencies in achieving success in the travel industry.
news.headline: Travel Leaders Network supports small travel agencies during Small Business Month, empowering them through tools & support.

news.summary: In Verona, Wisconsin, Everlight Solar has been named a Neighborhood Fave for 2024 by Nextdoor, a platform for neighbors to connect and recommend favorite businesses. This accolade, decided solely by community votes, highlights Everlight Solar's popularity among locals.
news.headline: Everlight Solar named 2024 Nextdoor Neighborhood Fave based on community votes for trusted businesses.

news.summary: Applied Materials Inc (NASDAQ: AMAT) released its Q2 financial results, with revenue totaling $7.1 billion, slightly below analyst predictions of $7.13 billion. The company exceeded earnings forecasts, reporting $2.39 per share compared to the expected $2.31. Year-over-year, total revenue saw a 7% increase, with a gross margin of 49.1% in the second quarter. Applied Materials also disclosed generating $1.57 billion. For a more detailed narrative on this, you can access the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Applied Materials Q2 earnings: Revenue $7.1B (below est.), EPS $2.39 (beat), solid guidance, no changes in customer demand.

news.summary: Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ: TTWO) released its fourth-quarter financial results, with net bookings totaling $1.58 billion, marking a 17% increase from the previous year. This exceeded the $1.55 billion estimate from financial data provider Benzinga Pro. Earnings per share came in at $1.08, falling short of the expected $1.10 per share. Recurrent consumer spending drove a 14% year-over-year increase in net bookings, accounting for 77% of the total. Major contributors to net bookings included titles like "NBA 2K25," "Grand Theft Auto Online," "Grand Theft Auto V," "Civilization VII," "Toon Blast," and "Match Factory!" For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Take-Two's Q4 net bookings: $1.58B, up 17% YoY. Earnings per share: $1.08, missed estimates. Recurrent consumer spending: 77%.

news.summary: QuoteMedia, Inc. announced their financial results for Q1 2025 with revenue increasing by 3% to $4,824,356 from $4,679,200 in Q1 2024. Adjusted EBITDA for Q1 2025 saw a decrease to $368,269 from $676,886 in Q1 2024, and a net loss of $499,811 compared to a net loss of $28,176 in Q1 2024. Despite challenges faced in 2024, QuoteMedia's quarterly revenue was its highest in company history. The company expects continued growth and is optimistic about future opportunities. A conference call to discuss Q1 2025 financial results will be held on May 16, 2025, at 2:00 PM Eastern Time. QuoteMedia is a leading provider of financial market information to various institutions and corporations.
news.headline: QuoteMedia reported Q1 2025 revenue of $4,824,356 (up 3%) with a net loss of $499,811. Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $368,269.

news.summary: In Mayfield Heights, Ohio, Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) is set to take part in the KeyBanc Industrials & Basic Materials Conference on May 29, 2025. Jugal Vijayvargiya, the President and Chief Executive Officer, along with Shelly Chadwick, the Vice President of Finance and Chief Financial Officer, will be present for individual meetings with investors all through the day. Materion Corporation, renowned for advanced material solutions for high-performance sectors, continues to lead as a global industry expert.
news.headline: Materion Corp (NYSE: MTRN) to join KeyBanc Conference on May 29, 2025; Key executives will meet investors.

news.summary: In Toronto, Rupert Resources Ltd has released its unaudited financial results for the three months ending March 31, 2025. These results, along with the accompanying Management’s Discussion and Analysis for the same period, are now available on the Company’s website, www.rupertresources.com. Additionally, the financial statements and MD&A can be found on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca. Graham Crew, the Chief Executive Officer of Rupert Resources, expressed satisfaction with the results.
news.headline: Rupert Resources reports Q1 2025 financial results on their website and SEDAR+. CEO Graham Crew comments.

news.summary: Dallas-based company New Concept Energy, Inc. (NYSE American: GBR) has released its Results of Operations for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The Company reported a net loss of ($20,000) from continuing operations, contrasting with a net income of $2,000 during the same period in 2024. In terms of revenue, the company generated $38,000 for the first quarter of both 2025 and 2024, with $26,000 attributed to rental income.
news.headline: New Concept Energy, Inc. reports a net loss of $20,000 in Q1 2025, down from $2,000 profit in Q1 2024, with revenue of $38,000.

news.summary: In the first fiscal quarter of 2025, 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. reported a 55% increase in net product revenues, reaching $163.6 thousand, while gross profit surged by 124% to $90.3 thousand. Operating expenses rose to approximately $2.09 million, notably due to increased spending in sales and investor-related services, and stock-based compensation. The net loss attributable to common shareholders amounted to approximately $2.01 million, compared to a net income of $308.7 thousand in the same quarter of 2024. 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company focused on developing new medicines for infectious diseases.
news.headline: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals reported Q1 2025 results: Net product revenues up 55% to $163.6 thousand, gross profit up 124% to $90.3 thousand. Includes increased operating expenses leading to a net loss of $2.01 million in Q1 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. The latest data reveals that approximately 250,000 new jobs were created in the last month alone, with the majority of them in the technology and healthcare sectors. This decrease in unemployment has been largely attributed to the government’s initiatives to boost job creation and support small businesses. Economists are optimistic about the future outlook, believing that this trend will continue in the coming months. Additionally, it was noted that the average hourly wage increased by 3.5% compared to the previous year, indicating positive growth in the labor market. This decline in unemployment and rise in wages are seen as positive signals for the overall economic recovery of the country.
news.headline: Beam Global reports Q1 2025 financial performance.

news.summary: Irving, Texas - On May 15, 2025, Commercial Metals Company (NYSE: CMC) revealed the completion of a sale worth $150.0 million in original aggregate principal amount of Solid Waste Disposal Facilities Revenue Bonds. This move was formally announced by CMC.
news.headline: Commercial Metals Company closes $150M tax-exempt bond financing for Solid Waste Disposal Facilities.

news.summary: A well-known space strategy game, Galactic Civilizations IV, is undergoing a significant update in key aspects such as galaxy creation, fleet organization, and artificial intelligence. The revamp, announced in Plymouth, Michigan on May 15, 2025, includes improvements to core gameplay mechanics and map generation.
news.headline: Galactic Civilizations IV v3.0 update announced, revamping core game mechanics, with franchise sale on Steam.

news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on May 15, 2025, Florida Southern College announced the introduction of its inaugural group of students at the School of Architecture on the historic Frank Lloyd Wright campus. The school is scheduled to commence operations in fall 2025, symbolizing a noteworthy milestone for the institution.
news.headline: Florida Southern College to welcome first architecture student cohort in Fall 2025 on Frank Lloyd Wright campus.

news.summary: In Farmington, Connecticut, Horizon Technology Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: HRZN) revealed its succession planning strategy. Horizon, an affiliate of Monroe Capital, offers secured loans to technology, life science, healthcare information, and sustainability industries. As a top specialty finance provider, Horizon assists venture capital, private equity-backed, and publicly traded companies. This announcement marks a significant step for the Company as it plans for the future of leadership.
news.headline: Horizon Technology Finance appoints Michael P. Balkin as CEO, an affiliate of Monroe Capital, providing secured loans to various industries.

news.summary: MasterControl, a prominent provider of quality, manufacturing, and asset management software solutions, has introduced a new AI-powered feature to aid regulated manufacturers in simplifying the process of creating electronic batch records. The company declared the beta release of Master Template on May 15, 2025 in Berlin. This innovative feature aims to enhance efficiency and streamline operations for manufacturers by utilizing artificial intelligence technology.
news.headline: MasterControl releases Master Template Generator Beta to help streamline electronic batch record creation for regulated manufacturers.

The shift is effective immediately, with Johnson retaining his position on the board. MDU Resources Group, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol MDU.
news.headline: MDU Resources Group appoints Darrel T. Anderson as new Board Chair, succeeding Dennis W. Johnson.

news.headline: Jay Yu appointed CFO of Ispire Technology Inc. in June 2023, cutting $3.6 million in annual payroll in May 2025.

news.summary: Endo, Inc. based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, made a significant announcement on May 15, 2025, stating that their product ADRENALIN® is the first FDA-approved and sole manufacturer-prepared epinephrine premixed intravenous (IV) bag commercially available. The company's stock symbol is OTCQX: NDOI. This development marks a milestone in the medical field as it addresses the need for readily available, pre-prepared epinephrine solutions in healthcare settings. This initiative provides immediate access to critical care solutions and enhances treatment efficiency.
news.headline: Endo Inc. introduces new concentration of ADRENALIN® ready-to-use premixed bags, the only FDA-approved IV epinephrine bag.

news.summary: Seattle-based Jones Soda Co. (CSE: JSDA) (OTCQB: JSDA) revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company reported revenue of $4.6 million for this quarter, showcasing a comparison with the same period last year.

news.summary: A company based in Westford, Massachusetts, Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI), revealed on May 15, 2025, that its Board of Directors gave the green light for a quarterly cash dividend to stockholders. The approved amount is $0.34 per share, scheduled to be disbursed on August 7, 2025, for stockholders noted as of July 10, 2025. It was mentioned that subsequent dividend declarations will require Board consent and could be altered based on business requirements or market circumstances.
news.headline: Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share on May 15, 2025, to be paid on August 7, 2025.

news.summary: A significant achievement has been reached in establishing a self-sufficient critical minerals and materials (CMM) supply chain that is not dependent on China. This milestone represents a crucial step towards ensuring independence in sourcing essential minerals and materials. The development of this integrated and operational supply chain marks a key advancement in bolstering national security and economic stability. This achievement underscores the importance of reducing reliance on a single source for critical resources.
news.headline: WTMA and EM announce SEC registration statement's effectiveness for strategic business combination, aiming for an independent CMM supply chain.

news.summary: Today, Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) from Westford, Mass., announced a plan for stock repurchase of up to $50 million. This plan is effective from May 15, 2025, to May 15, 2026. The repurchases can occur through public or private transactions, including under Securities Exchange Act Rule 10b-5-1 trading plans. The specifics of repurchase, such as timing and amounts, will be decided by the company's management considering market conditions and other factors, including constraints outlined in their credit agreement made on March 1, 2017, and later restated. As of now, no shares have been bought back under the $50 million authorization that is set to end on May 16, 2025.
news.headline: Kadant Inc. authorizes share repurchase of up to $50 million from May 15, 2025 through May 15, 2026. No shares repurchased yet.

news.summary: BIO-key, a company listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BKYI, has disclosed its Q1’25 financial results. The revenue for the quarter stood at $1.6 million, indicating a positive financial performance. Tomorrow, on Friday, May 16th at 10am Eastern Time, BIO-key will be hosting an investor call, providing an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the recent financial developments and future prospects of the company.
news.headline: BIO-key's Q1’25 revenue: $1.6M, cash position: $3.1M. Investor call on May 16th at 10am ET.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on May 15, 2025, Hapbee Technologies, Inc. (TSXV: HAPB | OTCQB: HAPBF), a notable provider of wearable wellness technology, has partnered with Liberty Alliance, a veteran-owned business (SDVOSB) known for defense innovation and mission support. This venture is geared towards bringing Hapbee's unique ultra-low frequency wearable devices to military personnel, special operations forces, and veteran communities globally.
news.headline: Hapbee Technologies partners with Liberty Alliance to provide wearable technology to the defense sector; TSXV: HAPB | OTCQB: HAPBF.
